text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, July 02. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I can run some projections for you. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
